body:
And also support all the Linux, Windows, macOS builds for the application in similar way.

Make sure download page have exactly all the features we have at https://github.com/konard/vk-bot-desktop, so our download page is well designed respects themes, switching, we generate screenshots in CI/CD and more.

Make sure to by default use in process agent, that works similar to github.com/link-assistant/agent

With option to use server API (by default turned off), with docs to how configure claude/codex/agent CLIs with the local server of formal AI.

We should reuse as much code from the web app inside electron, with ability to directly connect to the app on GitHub, to actually do sync with local database, and also web app should be able auto detect local API server if turned on, and also we can extend web app features by executing and routing http requests, tool calls, code execution and so on to local app + dockers.

Ideally would be to try to implement both https://github.com/link-foundation/lino-rest-api and universal LinksQL like extension of idea from https://github.com/link-assistant/link-cli and features of GraphQL.

For now only OpenAI compatible APIs should be supported in traditional REST APIs for compatibility reasons. All other communication between our systems and components should prefer using Links Notation.

Use all the best practices from CI/CD templates (check full file tree to compare for all GitHub workflow and CI/CD scripts file), if the same issue is found in template report issue also in templates:
- https://github.com/link-foundation/js-ai-driven-development-pipeline-template
- https://github.com/link-foundation/rust-ai-driven-development-pipeline-template
- https://github.com/link-foundation/python-ai-driven-development-pipeline-template
- https://github.com/link-foundation/csharp-ai-driven-development-pipeline-template

We should compare all files, so we don't have more CI/CD errors in the future and reuse all the best practices from these templates.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in this single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Add /download page similar to what we have at https://github.com/konard/vk-bot-desktop
